name: icon-palette
description: Set custom icons and colors on files, folders, tabs, tags, properties, and bookmarks, with a rulebook to apply them automatically.

scripts.build: npm run generate:icons && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production && node scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs
scripts.lint: eslint . --max-warnings 0 --ignore-pattern src/IconPaletteSettingTab.ts && eslint src/IconPaletteSettingTab.ts --max-warnings 1 && node scripts/check-submission.mjs
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Charles Kelsoe (ckelsoe)
